# External References & Reading List

Curated articles, papers, and posts relevant to AI discoverability.

## Foundational

| Title | Source | Date | Summary | Link |
|-------|--------|------|---------|------|
| Profound AEO Platform | Profound.com | 2025 | "How AI talks about you" — AEO company, $35M Series B from Sequoia | https://profound.com |
| How to Sell to Agents | Brian Flynn (X) | Mar 2026 | Coase's theorem updated for AI. Trust becomes machine-evaluable. 95% of services aren't agent-ready. | Full text in /external/articles/ |
| x402 Protocol | Coinbase | 2025 | HTTP 402-based payment protocol for agent commerce. Micropayments via USDC. | https://x402.org |
| x402-mcp | Vercel | Sep 2025 | MCP integration for x402 paid tools. Discovery + payment in one protocol stack. | https://vercel.com/blog/introducing-x402-mcp-open-protocol-payments-for-mcp-tools |

| Title | Source | Date | Summary | Link |

| Agent Purchasing Economics | Brian Flynn | Mar 2026 | Agents delegate when specialized services are 7-50x cheaper and 50-100x faster. | /research/agent-selection/flynn-agent-purchasing-economics.md |

## MCP & Connectors

| Title | Source | Date | Summary | Link |

## CLI Agent-Readability & Tool Optimization

| Title | Source | Date | Summary | Link |
|-------|--------|------|---------|------|
| AGENTS.md Standard | agents.md | 2026 | "README for agents" — used by 60K+ projects. Read by Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI. | https://agents.md |
| llms.txt Standard | llmstxt.org | 2025-26 | robots.txt for LLMs. Token-optimized doc sitemaps. "Highest ROI task in 2026." | https://llmstxt.org |
| SpecLeft MCP Experiment | dimwiddle (Dev.to) | Mar 2026 | Real data: MCP wrapper added +77% tokens, +47% time, but -21% output tokens. MCP overhead is real. | https://dev.to/dimwiddle/the-mcp-i-built-for-ai-agents-backfired-4c8j |
| CLIs Beat MCP for AI Agents | Lalatendu Swain (Medium) | Feb 2026 | "Start with CLI. Add MCP where governance demands it." Makes the case for CLI-first, MCP-second. | https://lalatenduswain.medium.com/why-clis-beat-mcp-for-ai-agents |
| A Deep Dive Into MCP and AI Tooling | a16z | Mar 2025 | "Providers need to make sure their tooling is easily discoverable and differentiated enough for the agent to pick." | https://a16z.com/a-deep-dive-into-mcp-and-the-future-of-ai-tooling/ |
| Packmind Agent Context Evaluator | Packmind | Feb 2026 | Tool that evaluates AGENTS.md effectiveness across Claude Code, Copilot, Codex, OpenCode. | https://packmind.com/evaluate-context-ai-coding-agent/ |
| Best llms.txt Platforms | Fern | Jan 2026 | How platforms auto-generate token-optimized docs for AI agents. | https://buildwithfern.com/post/best-llms-txt-implementation-platforms-ai-discoverable-apis |
